title: gh-146589: Fix raw buffer merge in UnixConsole.getpending()
author: cuiweixie
body:
## Summary

Fixes gh-146589.

When `getpending()` merges consecutive events from the queue, `e.raw` was
updated with `e.raw += e.raw` instead of appending the second event's bytes.
Use `e.raw += e2.raw`, consistent with `e.data += e2.data`.

## Test plan

- Exercise pyrepl on Unix with pending input coalescing (manual), or run
  relevant `_pyrepl` tests if present.

comments.author: picnixz
comments.body: Closing because we don't have a consensus yet in the original issue https://github.com/python/cpython/issues/145886.

comments.author: picnixz
comments.body: In addition, don't use AI to generate PRs or we will restrict your access should this be overused. TiA.
